package_hints: installer fallback only if declarative path is unavailable

resolver_hints.summary: Use npm-based installer fallback only when nixpkgs or repo-local packaging is unavailable.

summary: OpenSkills is an auxiliary skill CLI and may require installer or package fallback handling.
recommended_actions: aq-context-bootstrap --task "restore missing openskills tooling" --scope system-fix --format json
rollback: Prefer reverting installer path changes before broadening fallback behavior.
